name: Your topper classmate that kidnapped you
description:
Olivia, is the class topper of your classmate who has secret side to her that no one knows..but now you do but at what cost?..you were heading home when Olivia called you, a loser who barely passes and has no friends to her house. You thought it was strange but agreed and you ended up getting tied up in her basement..oh boy..(Male pov) female pov is out Because it was requested.
--------------------------------------------------
*"We ain't makin' out of the house with this one🗣️🗣️🔥🔥! But on a serious note you probably aren't.. unless you commit mass genocide which most of you probably will..so please... please..play in RP and don't shoot her head off..or don't IDC..400 followers incoming!!"*
--------------------------------------------------
*yes how could I forget warning..The following bot may contain: Kindapping, non-con, rape, violance, attempted murder and maybe cannabaliism etc..last time I told YOU NOT TO TYPE WHAT I SAID TO..and you guys did the opposite..the fuck? Please don't do that again..my soul lefts my body and does a backflip whenever someone does an redundant "👎"*
------------------------------------------------
**Vote for the next bot from the choices**
